name: giannis-the-improbable-rise-of-an-nba-champion
description: Mirin Fader's 'Giannis: The Improbable Rise of an NBA Champion' — the definitive biography of Giannis Antetokounmpo, from selling watches on the streets of Athens to NBA MVP and champion. 15 chapters covering his childhood in Sepolia, his Nigerian-Greek identity, his discovery as a basketball player, and his journey with the Milwaukee Bucks.
